title: rubus hahnei
intro: Rubus hahnei, also known as Hahne's black raspberry or Japanese wine raspberry, is a species of bramble in the rose family, Rubusaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus hahnei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Rubus hahnei can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various uses in traditional medicine.
